text: Planning a trip is always exciting. Last summer, I traveled to Japan, a country I had dreamed of visiting for years. The new culture amazed me; from temples to crowded streets, everything felt different. The food was incredible, especially the fresh sushi and warm ramen. However, language barriers were challenging. I used hand gestures and a translation app to order meals and ask for directions. Despite these difficulties, I made wonderful memories. I still remember the kindness of a stranger who helped me find my hotel. Travel teaches you to adapt and appreciate diversity, and those experiences stay with you forever.
